title: Core Test App Matrix
description: Curated first-wave test apps that cover the primary AIAST blueprint families before broader downstream trials.

apps.goal: Exercise multi-surface coordination across packaging, ops, mobile, and AI scaffolds.
Exercise the fullstack web bootstrap and blueprint projection path.
Exercise the Python API bootstrap and service-oriented validation path.
Exercise the mobile-first bootstrap and Android packaging assumptions.
Exercise the CLI-first repo shape and lean runtime scaffolding path.
